Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7011 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}Phew... That was a tough enemy, but we managed to take it down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}How are you feeling, Aigis? If you ever get tired or anything, be sure to let us know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 3 25 25}With all of this happening so suddenly, being leader must be tough on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 1 25 25}Being leader might be tough, but my sister led the way brilliantly![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30104 0 0}It's all thanks to her that our fight went so smoothly. Don't you guys agree?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}Yeah. I was worried since we've been out of practice for so long, but now I feel confident that we can manage.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}Anyway, it looks like that figure's gone, too. We might as well keep moving.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7063 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 3 25 25}Oh right, the figure. What's really going on here, I wonder...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2118 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Alright! This is some smooth sailin'! Feels like things are goin' pretty good so far, yeah?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}I was a little worried before we joined you guys, but it seems like things are A-OK![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3047 0 0}Aigis has it together way more than you do. I was honestly really worried about you and Koromaru.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}We totally had things together, thank you very much! And we tried really, really hard to do a good job![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3131 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 1 25 25}I'm kidding. I know we can count on you to make things happen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}Sister... Do those two dislike each other?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}No way, Ai-chan! We've got a real connection, y'know!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}The connection we have runs deep, y'know? Take it from me—I'm a pretty deep guy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Eh, a real connection doesn't always look one way, y'know? Sometimes you get along, and other times... not as much...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3031 0 0}That's all right. It's between us, anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 11 3 25 25}In that last battle, I wasn't in the way, was I? I didn't do anything I shouldn't have, right...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Oho, look at that! The li'l kid's fishin' for compliments![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}Sister, that's not true! You know that, right? I'm not a child.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 3 25 25}Junpei seems like the kind of guy kids would love, but they really don't care much for him, do they?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 3 25 25}Yeah, yeah, I get it. Let's just get going already.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7075 0 0}You know... I've been wondering about something ever since we saw your past.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 4 25 25}About Akihiko and me? What were you wondering, Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}When did you both get tal—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}Cutting yourself off only makes people more interested in what you were going to say. Right, Aigis?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3012 0 0}Doesn't it? You've already let the cat out of the bag, Amada.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 4 25 25}I-I said it was nothing! Really! Nothing at all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 3 25 25}There you have it. I think that's enough.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}Amada, if you ever feel like telling us something, just speak up. You're too reserved for your own good anyway.[n]{f 1 1}
